name: happy-app-audit
description: Audit a local macOS app's telemetry / reporting behavior using static analysis only. Reverse-engineers an .app bundle to identify embedded SDKs (AppLog/TEA, Parfait, TTNet, mars, MMKV, Sentry, Firebase, Bugly, Umeng, etc.), mapped upload endpoints, local on-disk queues, and privacy-relevant fields — without packet capture, network requests, debugger attach, or DRM bypass. Use when user asks to investigate, audit, or reverse-engineer a macOS app for telemetry, reporting, data upload, privacy, or
author: iamzhihuix
summary_zh: 纯静态分析macOS应用遥测行为的工具。无需抓包调试，就能逆向排查应用内置的追踪SDK、上传地址和隐私字段，适合审查应用隐私合规或逆向调查数据上报情况。
